extraction.chief_complaint: Chest discomfort and shortness of breath
suggested_questions: Can you describe the chest discomfort?
How severe is the shortness of breath?

extraction.clinician_summary: Patient reports experiencing chest discomfort and shortness of breath since this morning, which worsens with walking. Patient is taking daily blood pressure medication.

safety_notes: Deterministic red-flag screen matched: chest pain, severe shortness of breath. This output is an intake summary only. It is not medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment. A clinician must review the case before any clinical decision.
